nodes.standard_name: Gang de la Brise de Mer
nodes.original_text_name: Gang de la Brise de Mer
nodes.context: Corsican criminal organization founded in the 1970s, based in Northern Corsica, involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, money laundering, etc.
Corsican gang dominant in the Ajaccio area in the 2020s, part of the southern alliance.
Corsican clan known as the 'Shepherd Robbers of Venzolasca'.
Criminal organization listed as an ally in the infobox.
Italian organized crime syndicate based in Sicily.
Italian organized crime syndicate based in Calabria.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
edges.evidence_quote: The "Brise de Mer" is also suspected of involvement in the 2001 murders of members of Armata Corsa , a separatist Corsican armed group.
edges.context: Brise de Mer is suspected of killing members of Armata Corsa.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Petit Bar Gang , Venzolasca Gang , Armata Corsa
edges.context: The infobox lists Petit Bar Gang as a rival of Brise de Mer.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Petit Bar Gang , Venzolasca Gang , Armata Corsa
edges.context: The infobox lists Venzolasca Gang as a rival of Brise de Mer.
